description:
Execute a shell command and return its output (stdout + stderr combined).
- You MUST set workdir explicitly; never rely on the current process directory
- Commands time out after 120s by default
- Common uses: run EditMode tests, show git status, find asmdef references
- When commands call python or python3, they use the Python runtime selected in Settings > General
- Use the description field to briefly describe what the command does

description.description: Brief description of what this command does, e.g. 'Run EditMode tests', 'Show git status', 'Find asmdef references'

workdir.description: Working directory to run the command in. Required.
